subject: Kabu, the Motostoke Gym Leader from Pokémon Sword & Shield — a Fire-type specialist standing in his gym arena with arms crossed
description: A tan-skinned older man with short grey-white hair and a neat moustache stands center-frame in his Pokémon Gym arena, arms crossed in a poised, ready stance. He wears a white martial-arts-style uniform — a sleeveless gi top open over his chest with red trim and a black sash, and loose white trousers. The Motostoke Gym crest, a stylized red flame inside a gold ring, hangs prominently over the wall behind him. The background depicts the gym stadium with banks of seated spectators rendered as soft pinkish-tan dots, an arched skylit ceiling, and the warm orange glow of stage lighting. The composition centers on Kabu as the disciplined, austere Fire-type Gym Leader, mid-shot and forward-facing.
foreground: Kabu standing with arms crossed in white martial-arts uniform with red and black accents
background: Pokémon Gym stadium interior with stylized spectator crowd, arched skylight, and the red-and-gold Motostoke Gym flame crest mounted on the wall
emotion: disciplined, composed, focused — the stoic veteran coach posture
